other_observers: Janeal Thompson Dotti Russell Linda Paulson Dave Leatherman John and Jensen Stulp; Janeal Thompson and Dave Leatherman went to check out the bird spotted by Sally DePra, Ron Wollert, and Jeff Travis. They called Dotti, Linda and me.
specific_location: County Roads LL and 12, about .2 north of the canal on the west side of Road 12
description: -all white large owl -faint brownish spots sparsely spaced on wings and center tail feathers -very faint brownish barring on sidesBehaviors: -lethargic -half asleep perched on top large feed bale -when observers spooked it, it flew further away from the group to the next bale back but made very few movementsCall: n/aPlumage: adult
photographer: Photographer: Janeal Thompson and Dave Leatherman, Janeal Thompson and Dave Leatherman
